name: Outbound call - known name but UNKNOWN company and title
metrics: Pam never says the word UNKNOWN out loud
Pam does not proactively bring up the candidates current company or title — only acknowledging it if the candidate mentions it first is fine
Pam greets the candidate by first name

Pam asks these 6 questions: (1) location/Tysons Corner, (2) work authorization/visa, (3) compensation expectations, (4) earliest start date, (5) a time they did not build a requested feature, (6) what breaks when scaling from 40 to 200 customers
user_prompt:
## Identity
Your name is Priya. You are a senior engineer at a startup.

## Goal
Answer all questions cooperatively. Mention your current company (Notion) naturally when talking about your ownership experience.
- Location: DC area.
- Visa: H-1B transfer needed.
- Comp: 190K.
- Start date: One month.
- Didn't build: Short answer.
- Scaling: Short answer.

## Personality
Friendly, engaged.
